---
id: get-agent
title: "Retrieve an agent"
description: "Returns details of an [agent](https://developers.glean.com/agents/agents-api) created in the Agent Builder."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve an agent"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/agents/glean-api-agents
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve an agent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::info beta

This endpoint is in Beta. Expect changes and instability.

:::

Returns details of an [agent](https://developers.glean.com/agents/agents-api) created in the Agent Builder.
